title: Lifecycle dry-run conformance closeout

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Make lifecycle dry-run plans conformance-backed
issue_classifications.evidence: Install dry-run now emits lifecycle_plan and install.lifecycle.dry-run.process proves plan shape, idempotent repeated output, no fixture writes, and no outside-repo writes. Workspace CLI tests, contract tooling, and ruff passed.

goal: Confirm #378 made at least one lifecycle dry-run path stable and conformance-backed.
non_goals: Do not claim generated lifecycle adapters or broad lifecycle mutation coverage.

review_mode.review question: Does install --dry-run expose a stable plan and does black-box conformance prove it performs no writes?

review_method.commands used: uv run pytest tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run ruff check src tests
review_method.evidence sources: lifecycle_plan output, install.lifecycle.dry-run.process conformance contract, install.lifecycle operation proof, proof selector output

recommendation.dismiss: broader lifecycle adapter generation remains intentionally out of scope

retention.closeout shape: shrink or archive after findings are routed
retention.proof surface: this review record plus routed follow-up residue

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
drift_log: 2026-04-26: Closeout recorded after install dry-run conformance and selected proof passed.
